text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both posting modest single-digit gains while the market sits in extreme fear, suggesting cautious buying into weakness rather than conviction-driven rallies. Bitcoin's dominance at 56.1% and relatively thin $72B daily volume indicate risk appetite remains subdued across the board, with traders still unwilling to aggressively chase positions. The slight uptick in fear sentiment over the past week hints at stabilization, but sustained buying pressure has not yet materialized at these levels.
